title: How to show the different color of each item in Calendar?
excerpt: Hello. I created several items in one board. When I go to “Calendar view,” it shows items in the same color. I would like to see those items in different colors as we see them in “Main Table.” Is there a way to do it? Th…

posts.author: Akiko (Akiko Izumitani)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello. I created several items in one board. When I go to “Calendar view,” it shows items in the same color. I would like to see those items in different colors as we see them in “Main Table.” Is there a way to do it? Thank you in advance.

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there! Sorry for the late response here!

The colors in the Calendar View are determined by the items’ group color. However, you can change the color by going to the Calendar View settings and clicking into the “Color By” dropdown menu.

Let us know if you have any questions by sending a message to support@monday.com!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
